name: River-Marrow Body
description: Water and earth have settled into your bones, letting your body endure pressure like a stone beneath a current.

name: Ironbone Constitution
description: Metal essence has found the hard places inside you. Your frame remembers the forge even after the fire dies.

name: Ember Vessel Body
description: Fire essence lingers in your blood, eager to turn strain into heat and heat into force.

name: Verdant Root Body
description: Wood essence gathers quietly in your flesh, favoring patience, recovery, and stubborn growth.

name: Cloudbreath Constitution
description: Cloud and wind essence make your breath feel larger than your chest, as if the sky has left a small door open.

name: Frostthread Meridians
description: Ice essence traces cool lines through your meridians, slowing panic and sharpening sensation.
